title: Cover — Gifted Productions Inc.: 5-Year Strategic Plan 2026–2030
description: Full-bleed star-field galaxy cover with GalaxyBots logo, plan title, tagline, and confidentiality notice.

title: Chairman's Opening — Chairman Atlas
description: Chairman Atlas opening statement: declaration of ambition, category-creation framing, board endorsement.

title: The Problem — Magnus Drake
description: 76% of SMEs have no C-Suite. $1M–$5M exec team cost. Generic AI fails. Magnus Drake's call to action.

title: The Vision — $90M ARR by 2030
description: 51 AI Directors. 4 platform pillars. North Star metric: $90M ARR, 3,000 companies, 700 white-label partners.

title: Market Opportunity — FP&A Oracle Demi
description: TAM $500B. SAM 32M SMEs + 500K agencies. SOM 50,000 U.S. growth-stage companies. Demi's validation.

title: Competitive Landscape — Growth Hawk Yusuf
description: Positioning above generic AI, below $500K enterprise builds. Cloud 9 Score wedge. Memory + Boardroom moat.

title: Product: GalaxyBots.ai Platform — Product Oracle Sasha
description: 51 directors across 9 departments. Virtual Boardroom. Mission Library. Institutional Memory. ROI Dashboard.

title: Product: BingoLingo.ai — Brand Maven Priya
description: Content Intelligence Platform. AEO scoring. Content Hub. Attribution loop. BingoLingo-Prospector cross-sell.

title: Product: Prospector (AEO Intelligence Engine) — Digital Dominic + Rivera
description: Cloud 9 Score across 9 engines. Discover → Enrich → Qualify → Contact → Convert pipeline. Competitive AEO.

title: Product: GalaxyBots Mobile — Operator Rex
description: Command Center. Governance & Approvals. ROI Reports. Daily Journal. Executive command from anywhere.

title: Business Model & Revenue Streams — CFO Sentinel Marcus
description: Four revenue levers: Subscription tiers ($999/$4,999/$9,999), credit overages, premium add-ons, white-label wholesale.

title: Unit Economics — Marcus + FP&A Oracle Demi
description: $36K ACV. 82% gross margin. 8:1 LTV:CAC. >110% NRR. <9-month payback. The self-growing business model.

title: 5-Year Financial Projections — Chairman Atlas + CFO Marcus
description: Full ARR table: $1.2M → $4.8M → $14M → $38M → $90M. Client and partner milestones. Conservative assumptions.

title: Growth Levers — Growth Hawk Yusuf + Partner Pro Felix
description: Partner-led channel. AEO category ownership. Credit expansion flywheel. BingoLingo-Prospector cross-sell.

title: Go-To-Market Strategy — Brand Maven Priya + Closer King Rivera
description: Content-led, Partner-led, Community-led motions. Year 1 priorities: 10 partners, Prospector Phases 1–4, 90-day NRR.

title: Legal & IP Strategy — General Counsel Alexis
description: Cloud 9 Score™ and GalaxyBots™ trademarks. Trade secrets. Partner contracts. SOC 2 and GDPR roadmap.

title: Technology Roadmap — Tech Visionary Zara + Build Master Leon
description: Four-track swimlane: Platform, Content, Intelligence, Mobile across 2026–2030. Multi-LLM routing strategy.

title: Talent & Culture — HR Director Amara + Talent Hunter Jade
description: Commanders not managers. Year 1 critical hires. Engineering 5→20. Culture pillars: autonomy, proof-of-value.

title: Risk Register — Risk Warden Okafor + CISO Sentinel Nova
description: Four risks: LLM commoditization, regulatory shifts, partner concentration, data breaches — each with named owner.

title: 5-Year Roadmap Timeline (Visual)
description: Visual milestone chart: Q1 2026 Prospector launch → Q4 2030 $90M ARR / Series B exit readiness.

title: The Closing Vision — Magnus Drake + Chairman Atlas
description: Magnus Drake and Chairman Atlas closing declarations. The full board team displayed as unified endorsers.

title: Contact & Next Steps
description: GalaxyBots.ai and BingoLingo.ai platforms. Three CTA options. Confidentiality notice footer.

title: Credits Infographic — How Credits Work
description: Platform currency explainer: 1 credit = $0.025. Action costs per operation. Tier allocations (100/500/2,000). Credit expansion flywheel.
